title: Old Acquaintances
wikitext:
[]: Old Acquaintances...             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Feb 17, 2007 1:51 pm As I was watching episode #21' again, something once again caught my eye. When Gendou takes Fuyutsuki down into the Geofront, and they meet the elder Dr Akagi. There's an unusual look of surprise on Fuyutsuki's face. But what occurred to me as well was Gendou's sly sideways glance at Fuyutsuki's reaction. And all this in the context of Gendou trying to... persuade, Fuyutsuki to join Gerhin. Is there something between the lines here?

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Sat Feb 17, 2007 2:00 pm Since Fuyutsuki knew Naoko: ep21' wrote: AKAGI (OFF): Oh, Professor Fuyutsuki. FUYUTSUKI (OFF): Akagi, you too? AKAGI: Yes, this is the best place to research the fundamental theories for the bio-computers of the future. FUYUTSUKI: I see.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 17, 2007 2:09 pm "The truth is... Vice-Commander Fuyutsuki is your father!" "...... Liar." I never read anything into this scene beyond the two having known one another at Kyoto University or something. [EDIT: And what Ornette said.] I've been kinda partial to Shin-seiki's suggestion that Ritsuko's father was sperm in a syringe, myself. But I suppose it would work with the "it's a small world"* cliche, which demands that the cast include "old acquaintances/lovers reunited" (see: Misato, Kaji, Ritsuko) and characters (especially those of unknown or dubious parentage) either having received or sharing their genes with (an)other character(s). I remember opposition to this trope being one of Dr. Nick's beefs with a Misato/Kaworu half-sibling relationship. Kekeke. * Or insert official name. Ornette wrote: It looks like maybe Gendo is playing one of his how-to-convince-fuyu-into-joining-the-evil-empire cards.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Sat Feb 17, 2007 2:20 pm Reichu wrote: I've been kinda partial to Shin-seiki's suggestion that Ritsuko's father was sperm in a syringe, myself.

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Sat Feb 17, 2007 3:43 pm Reichu wrote: "The truth is... Vice-Commander Fuyutsuki is your father!" "...... Liar."

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 17, 2007 4:03 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I would actually be against taking Fuyutsuki's look this far.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Feb 17, 2007 6:17 pm Why Reichu, WHY?

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Feb 17, 2007 7:37 pm You people will all think I'm nuts, but strangely enough, I like that fanart. :shock: Reichu wrote: "Even the great computer nerd Naoko Akagi has joined our leagues. So what are you waiting for? Sell your soul to Gehirn today!"

[]:             Quote Post by Katayoku no Tenshi » Sat Feb 17, 2007 8:11 pm O course that would mean that Gendo and Fuyutsuki had slept with or wanted to sleep with two of the same people. Maybe the very things he didn't like in Ikari we're things he saw in himself FUYUTSUKI: Yes, my first impression of you was of distaste Ikari. IKARI: Because we're so alike? FUYUTSUKI: :oops: ... destroy that fan art! It's causing mental contamination!

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Feb 17, 2007 8:17 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: You people will all think I'm nuts , but strangely enough, I like that fanart. :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Sat Feb 17, 2007 8:23 pm @ KnT: If I had any photoshopping Skillage, I would SO copy and paste Gendo and Fuytsuki's heads onto this scene: FUYUTSUKI: Yes, my first impression of you was of distaste Ikari. IKARI: Because we're so alike? But such things would be wrong. Wrong indeed... :twisted: *coughs* AEF is right. Any more of this and we'll go mad. MAD I TELLS YA!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 17, 2007 8:27 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: You people will all think I'm nuts, but strangely enough, I like that fanart. :shock:

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat Feb 17, 2007 9:37 pm Reichu wrote: AEF wrote: Well I certainly [think you're nuts]!

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Feb 17, 2007 9:58 pm Anonymous_Evafan wrote: I've said I'm nuts for awhile now! Though not as nuts as you.
